Internal Provisioning Console

Spin up a full client site in one pass.

This page seeds a tenant database on your VPS, creates a Vercel project, injects the runtime database URL and admin credentials, and gives you the live URL back.

Provisioning Checking
Mode Unknown
Waiting for status

Factory Readiness

Required secrets are validated here before you try to create a site.

    Create New Site

    Provide the business essentials only. Client-facing phone is fixed globally in code for all generated sites.

    Provisioning Output

    You get the project URL, tenant database URL, and the follow-up checklist in one place.
